---
title: Publications
---
These are my publications (even my undergraduate honors thesis for nostalgia)

<style>
  .publist ol {
    list-style-type: none;
    counter-reset: item;
    padding-left: 0;
  }
  .publist ol > li {
    counter-increment: item;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .publist ol > li::before {
    content: "[" counter(item) "]  ";
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .publist a {font-weight: bold;}
</style>

:::{.publist}

1. **Evanns Morales-Cuadrado**, "[Learning-Based Minimum Time-Energy Path Planning Through Integral Reinforcement Learning for a Multivehicle Nonlinear System Subject to Unknown Disturbances and Collision Avoidance](https://mavmatrix.uta.edu/honors_spring2022/60/)" Undergraduate Honors College Thesis at UT Arlington, 2022.
{{< include ../cv/_sections/publications-shared.qmd >}}

:::
\* *indicates equal contribution*
